ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io swsh4-89. National Pokedex no. 377 matches. Seven-dot cross/H-pattern on torso is canonical Regi-family visual identifier shared across all members.

trivia_bullets.text: Regirock appears in Sword & Shield — Vivid Voltage (2020) as no. 089/185, a Holo Rare. National Pokedex no. 377, Legendary Rock-type, introduced in Generation III (Hoenn).

The Regi cycle has a 3+2 structure: original Hoenn trio (Regirock/Regice/Registeel, Gen III) + Regigigas (Gen IV Sinnoh, said to have created the trio) + two Gen VIII Crown Tundra additions (Regieleki/Regidrago, split-decision ruins). All five in party activates a Regigigas Max Raid Battle.
sources: WebSearch: Regi cycle, Bulbapedia: Legendary giants snippet

trivia_bullets.text: "The same rocks that form its body have been found in ground layers around the world."
Seven-dot cross/H-pattern on torso is the canonical visual identifier for all Regi-family members (each with unique dot arrangement).

related_cards.name: Regieleki
related_cards.note: Gen VIII Crown Tundra cycle addition

related_cards.name: Regidrago
related_cards.note: Gen VIII Crown Tundra cycle addition
